title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Baikunthpur
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Baikunthpur assembly segment.

snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Baikunthpur constituency.
